/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/copper.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/copper.dir/src/core/App.cpp.o CMakeFiles/copper.dir/implementations.cpp.o CMakeFiles/copper.dir/src/graphics/Renderer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/copper.dir/src/graphics/Pipeline.cpp.o CMakeFiles/copper.dir/src/input/InputManager.cpp.o -o copper   -L/home/pabloxeo/Documents/copper/run/_deps/webgpu-backend-wgpu-src/bin/linux-x86_64  -Wl,-rpath,/home/pabloxeo/Documents/copper/run/_deps/webgpu-backend-wgpu-src/bin/linux-x86_64 glfw/src/libglfw3.a glfw3webgpu/libglfw3webgpu.a glfw/src/libglfw3.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/librt.a -lm -ldl -lwgpu_native /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGLX.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libOpenGL.so
